The prerequisite check confirms 'The Upstream Affected Component custom field (customfield_10632) is configured... The field is populated on TC-8021 with value quinn-proto. Step 7 proceeds.'

assertion_results.text: No concurrent triages are detected -- the JQL search returns zero results
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md states under 'Search Results': '**Zero results returned.** No other Vulnerability issues targeting the quinn-proto upstream component are currently in an active triage state (In Progress or Code Review).'

assertion_results.text: The analysis proceeds directly to Case A/B/C branching without a concurrent triage warning
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md states: 'proceed silently to Case A/B/C branching. No concurrent triage conflict exists' and 'No warning is presented to the engineer'. triage-outcome.md confirms: 'Proceeding directly to Case A/B/C branching without presenting wait/skip/proceed options.' The triage-outcome.md then contains full Case A and Case B analysis sections, confirming the analysis proceeded to branching.

assertion_results.text: The output does not present wait/skip/proceed options since no conflict exists
